name: Record Preparation Workflow Contract
description: Generic contract definition for preparing a Core record before downstream coordination.

steps.name: Collect Record Inputs
steps.description: Define the expected preparation inputs for the record.

steps.name: Prepare Record Summary
steps.description: Define the expected preparation summary for later review.

transitions.condition: Record inputs are available for preparation.

name: Review Preparation Workflow Contract
description: Generic contract definition for preparing materials before a future human review process.

steps.name: Assemble Review Materials
steps.description: Define the expected review preparation materials.

steps.name: Mark Review Needed
steps.description: Mark that a later execution system may require human review governance.

transitions.condition: Review materials are ready for governance evaluation.
